prophecies.q: 《战争卷轴》(1QM) 总纲——光明之子与黑暗之子的末日之战
prophecies.a: 在末日的终极之战中，光明之子将与黑暗之子展开七轮大战。前三轮光明之子获胜，接下来三轮黑暗之子反扑得手，第七轮上帝亲自干预，光明之子取得最终胜利。整场战争持续四十年。
prophecies.q_en: War Scroll (1QM) Overview — The Final War of the Sons of Light vs. Sons of Darkness
prophecies.a_en: In the ultimate eschatological war, the Sons of Light will engage the Sons of Darkness in seven rounds of battle. The Sons of Light prevail in the first three rounds, the Sons of Darkness counterattack and win the next three, and in the seventh round God himself intervenes to grant the Sons of Light final victory. The entire war lasts forty years.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据死海古卷中的末世论文献推算
prophecies.yearReason_en: Derived from the eschatological texts in the Dead Sea Scrolls

prophecies.q: 《战争卷轴》(1QM) 第一阶段——对列国的战争
prophecies.a: 第一阶段战争将针对「基提人」（罗马人）和违反盟约的犹太人。光明之子将从旷野出发，先征服耶路撒冷周围的异族，然后扩展到埃及、亚述和巴比伦，最终征服所有国家。
prophecies.q_en: War Scroll (1QM) Phase One — War Against the Nations
prophecies.a_en: The first phase of war targets the 'Kittim' (Romans) and covenant-breaking Jews. The Sons of Light will march from the wilderness, first conquering foreign nations around Jerusalem, then expanding to Egypt, Assyria, and Babylon, ultimately conquering all nations.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 库姆兰社区在公元68年被罗马军团摧毁，社区成员被杀或逃散。预言中光明之子战胜「基提人」（罗马人）的战争从未发生，相反，罗马于公元70年摧毁了耶路撒冷圣殿。
prophecies.verdict_en: The Qumran community was destroyed by Roman legions in 68 AD, with members killed or scattered. The prophesied war where the Sons of Light defeat the 'Kittim' (Romans) never occurred; instead, Rome destroyed the Jerusalem Temple in 70 AD.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据死海古卷中的末世论文献推算
prophecies.yearReason_en: Derived from the eschatological texts in the Dead Sea Scrolls

prophecies.q: 《战争卷轴》(1QM) 天使参战
prophecies.a: 在末日之战中，天使长米迦勒将率领天使大军降临战场，与光明之子并肩作战。黑暗天使彼列（撒旦）则率领邪恶势力对抗。最终上帝将永远消灭黑暗，建立永恒的光明国度。
prophecies.q_en: War Scroll (1QM) — Angelic Intervention
prophecies.a_en: In the final war, the archangel Michael will descend with heavenly armies to fight alongside the Sons of Light. The angel of darkness Belial (Satan) leads the forces of evil in opposition. Ultimately God will destroy darkness forever and establish an eternal kingdom of light.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据死海古卷中的末世论文献推算
prophecies.yearReason_en: Derived from the eschatological texts in the Dead Sea Scrolls

prophecies.q: 《哈巴谷注释》(1QpHab) 论「基提人」的征服
prophecies.a: 基提人（被学者普遍认为指罗马人）将席卷大地，征服众多国家。他们迅捷而残忍，摧毁一切挡路之物。他们向各国征收贡品，掠夺财富，但终将在上帝的审判日灭亡。
prophecies.q_en: Pesher Habakkuk (1QpHab) — On the Conquest of the Kittim
prophecies.a_en: The Kittim (widely identified by scholars as Romans) will sweep across the earth and conquer many nations. They are swift and ruthless, destroying all in their path. They exact tribute from nations and plunder wealth, but will ultimately perish on God's day of judgment.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 罗马帝国确实在地中海世界建立了霸权，征服了包括犹太地区在内的广大领土，征收贡品并掠夺财富。这些描述与历史高度吻合。但「上帝审判日灭亡」的预言并未如社区所期待的那样迅速发生——罗马帝国持续了数百年，最终于公元476年（西罗马）因多种复杂因素衰亡。
prophecies.verdict_en: The Roman Empire did indeed establish hegemony across the Mediterranean, conquering vast territories including Judea, exacting tribute and plundering wealth — matching the description closely. However, the predicted swift divine destruction did not occur as the community expected; Rome endured for centuries, with the Western Empire falling in 476 AD due to complex factors.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据死海古卷中的末世论文献推算
prophecies.yearReason_en: Derived from the eschatological texts in the Dead Sea Scrolls

prophecies.q: 《哈巴谷注释》(1QpHab) 论「邪恶祭司」
prophecies.a: 邪恶的祭司最初被任命时是忠于真理的，但当他掌权统治以色列后，他的心变得骄傲，他背弃了上帝，为了财富而背叛律法。他掠夺人民的财富，积聚罪恶的钱财。最终上帝将把他交给仇敌之手受审。
prophecies.q_en: Pesher Habakkuk (1QpHab) — On the Wicked Priest
prophecies.a_en: The Wicked Priest was initially faithful to truth when appointed, but after gaining power over Israel, his heart grew proud. He abandoned God and betrayed the law for wealth. He plundered the people's riches and accumulated sinful wealth. Ultimately God will deliver him into the hands of his enemies for judgment.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 「邪恶祭司」的身份在学术界有多种推测，最常见的候选人是哈斯蒙尼王朝的大祭司，如约拿单·马加比（前161-143年在位）或西蒙·马加比。哈斯蒙尼祭司-国王确实将宗教权力与政治权力合一，并因世俗化和专权而受到批评。约拿单·马加比最终被叙利亚将军特里丰诱捕杀害，可对应「交给仇敌之手」。
prophecies.verdict_en: The identity of the 'Wicked Priest' is debated among scholars; leading candidates include Hasmonean high priests such as Jonathan Maccabeus (r. 161-143 BC) or Simon Maccabeus. The Hasmonean priest-kings did merge religious and political authority and were criticized for secularization. Jonathan was indeed captured and killed by the Seleucid general Trypho, potentially fulfilling 'delivered into enemy hands.'
prophecies.yearReason: 根据死海古卷中的末世论文献推算
prophecies.yearReason_en: Derived from the eschatological texts in the Dead Sea Scrolls

prophecies.q: 《哈巴谷注释》(1QpHab) 论末日的延迟
prophecies.a: 上帝告诉哈巴谷将末日写下来，但没有告诉他末日何时到来。末日的最终时刻将超出先知们所预言的一切时间，因为上帝的奥秘是奇妙的。末日虽然延迟，但必然到来，绝不会迟到。
prophecies.q_en: Pesher Habakkuk (1QpHab) — On the Delay of the End
prophecies.a_en: God told Habakkuk to write down the end times, but did not tell him when they would come. The final moment will exceed all times prophesied, for God's mysteries are wondrous. Though the end is delayed, it will surely come and will not be late.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据死海古卷中的末世论文献推算
prophecies.yearReason_en: Derived from the eschatological texts in the Dead Sea Scrolls

prophecies.q: 弥赛亚预言文本 (4Q521)——弥赛亚的神迹
prophecies.a: 天地将听从弥赛亚的命令。他来临时，天将与地融合，万物归一。主将行前所未有的大事：他将治愈伤者，使死人复活，向贫穷人传好消息，使饥饿者得饱足，引领流亡者归来。
prophecies.q_en: Messianic Apocalypse (4Q521) — Signs of the Messiah
prophecies.a_en: Heaven and earth will obey the Messiah's command. When he comes, heaven shall merge with earth and all things become one. The Lord will perform unprecedented wonders: he will heal the wounded, resurrect the dead, bring good news to the poor, satisfy the hungry, and lead the exiled home.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据死海古卷中的末世论文献推算
prophecies.yearReason_en: Derived from the eschatological texts in the Dead Sea Scrolls

prophecies.q: 双弥赛亚教义——祭司弥赛亚与王室弥赛亚
prophecies.a: 在末日来临时，将有两位受膏者（弥赛亚）出现：一位是亚伦的弥赛亚（祭司弥赛亚），另一位是以色列的弥赛亚（王室弥赛亚）。祭司弥赛亚的地位高于王室弥赛亚，在末世宴席上祭司弥赛亚先祝福饼和酒。
prophecies.q_en: Dual Messiah Doctrine — Priestly and Royal Messiahs
prophecies.a_en: At the end of days, two anointed ones (Messiahs) will appear: the Messiah of Aaron (priestly Messiah) and the Messiah of Israel (royal Messiah). The priestly Messiah holds higher rank than the royal Messiah, and at the eschatological banquet the priestly Messiah blesses the bread and wine first.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据死海古卷中的末世论文献推算
prophecies.yearReason_en: Derived from the eschatological texts in the Dead Sea Scrolls

prophecies.q: 《社区规章》(1QS) 末日审判
prophecies.a: 上帝已经设定了邪恶存在的期限。在预定的审判之时，上帝将用真理净化人类的一切作为，炼净人的身体，以消灭一切不义之灵。上帝将如同净化之水洒在义人身上，洗净一切谎言的污秽。
prophecies.q_en: Community Rule (1QS) — Final Judgment
prophecies.a_en: God has set a limit to the existence of wickedness. At the appointed time of judgment, God will purify all human deeds with truth, refining the body to destroy every spirit of injustice. God will sprinkle upon the righteous like purifying water, cleansing all defilement of falsehood.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据死海古卷中的末世论文献推算
prophecies.yearReason_en: Derived from the eschatological texts in the Dead Sea Scrolls

prophecies.q: 《社区规章》(1QS) 两灵论——光明与黑暗之灵
prophecies.a: 上帝创造了两种灵来统管人类直到末日：真理之灵（光明之子的引导者）和谬误之灵（黑暗之子的统治者）。两灵在每个人心中争战。在当前的时代，黑暗似乎占上风，但到了上帝所定的末期，真理将永远战胜谬误。
prophecies.q_en: Community Rule (1QS) — Doctrine of Two Spirits
prophecies.a_en: God created two spirits to govern humanity until the end: the spirit of truth (guide of the Sons of Light) and the spirit of falsehood (ruler of the Sons of Darkness). The two spirits war within every human heart. In the current age, darkness seems to prevail, but at God's appointed end, truth will triumph over falsehood forever.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据死海古卷中的末世论文献推算
prophecies.yearReason_en: Derived from the eschatological texts in the Dead Sea Scrolls

prophecies.q: 《圣殿卷轴》(11QT) 理想圣殿的蓝图
prophecies.a: 上帝将亲手建造一座终极圣殿，取代人手所造的一切圣殿。这座圣殿将在创世之日就已注定，存续到永远。圣殿的规模远超所罗门圣殿和第二圣殿，其建造方式和祭祀礼仪都将严格遵循上帝的直接启示。
prophecies.q_en: Temple Scroll (11QT) — Blueprint of the Ideal Temple
prophecies.a_en: God himself will build an ultimate Temple to replace all man-made temples. This Temple was foreordained from the day of creation and will endure forever. Its scale far surpasses Solomon's Temple and the Second Temple, with construction and ritual strictly following God's direct revelation.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据死海古卷中的末世论文献推算
prophecies.yearReason_en: Derived from the eschatological texts in the Dead Sea Scrolls

prophecies.q: 《那鸿注释》(4QpNah) 论「猛狮」与耶路撒冷
prophecies.a: 「猛狮」（被学者认为是塞琉古国王德米特里三世）将攻打耶路撒冷。「寻求光滑事物的人」（法利赛人）曾邀请他入侵，但「猛狮」会对他们施以残酷的报复——将活人挂在木头上。从前在以色列从未有过这样的事。
prophecies.q_en: Pesher Nahum (4QpNah) — On the 'Furious Young Lion' and Jerusalem
prophecies.a_en: The 'Furious Young Lion' (identified by scholars as Seleucid King Demetrius III) will attack Jerusalem. The 'seekers of smooth things' (Pharisees) had invited him to invade, but the 'lion' will exact cruel revenge — hanging men alive on wood. Such a thing had never before happened in Israel.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 学术界普遍认为此段描述的是哈斯蒙尼国王亚历山大·亚奈（前103-76年在位）。公元前88年法利赛人叛乱并邀请塞琉古王德米特里三世入侵，叛乱失败后亚历山大·亚奈将800名法利赛人钉十字架。约瑟夫斯《犹太古史》13.14.2记载了这一事件，与古卷描述高度吻合。
prophecies.verdict_en: Scholars widely identify this passage as describing Hasmonean King Alexander Jannaeus (r. 103-76 BC). In 88 BC, Pharisees revolted and invited Seleucid King Demetrius III to invade; after the revolt failed, Jannaeus crucified 800 Pharisees. Josephus (Antiquities 13.14.2) records this event, closely matching the scroll's description.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据死海古卷中的末世论文献推算
prophecies.yearReason_en: Derived from the eschatological texts in the Dead Sea Scrolls

prophecies.q: 《那鸿注释》(4QpNah) 论「寻求光滑事物的人」的末日
prophecies.a: 「寻求光滑事物的人」（法利赛人）的议会将在末日被消灭。他们的一切谋划将被揭露，他们的罪行在全以色列面前暴露无遗。他们的追随者将四散奔逃，不再有人被他们的教导所迷惑。
prophecies.q_en: Pesher Nahum (4QpNah) — On the End of the 'Seekers of Smooth Things'
prophecies.a_en: The council of the 'seekers of smooth things' (Pharisees) will be destroyed at the end of days. All their schemes will be exposed, their crimes laid bare before all Israel. Their followers will scatter, and no one will be led astray by their teachings anymore.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 法利赛派不仅未被消灭，反而成为犹太教存续的核心力量。公元70年圣殿被毁后，法利赛传统演变为拉比犹太教，成为至今仍在延续的犹太教主流形式。库姆兰社区本身反而在公元68年被罗马摧毁后消亡。
prophecies.verdict_en: Far from being destroyed, the Pharisees became the core force of Jewish survival. After the Temple's destruction in 70 AD, Pharisaic tradition evolved into Rabbinic Judaism, which remains the mainstream form of Judaism today. The Qumran community itself was destroyed by Rome in 68 AD and ceased to exist.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据死海古卷中的末世论文献推算
prophecies.yearReason_en: Derived from the eschatological texts in the Dead Sea Scrolls

prophecies.q: 《感恩诗篇》(1QH) 末日审判的景象
prophecies.a: 在末日审判之时，地狱之门大开，死亡的陷阱张开，灭亡的深渊裂开。地上的根基震动，战争在地下的深渊中爆发。大地发出呻吟，分娩的剧痛降临。一切都在痛苦中等待新世界的诞生。
prophecies.q_en: Thanksgiving Hymns (1QH) — Vision of Final Judgment
prophecies.a_en: At the time of final judgment, the gates of Sheol open wide, the snares of death spread out, and the chasms of perdition gape. The foundations of earth tremble, war erupts in the subterranean abyss. The earth groans and birth pangs descend. All things await in agony the birth of a new world.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据死海古卷中的末世论文献推算
prophecies.yearReason_en: Derived from the eschatological texts in the Dead Sea Scrolls

prophecies.q: 《感恩诗篇》(1QH) 义人的复活
prophecies.a: 虫蛆中的死者将从尘土中被举起，背负罪孽的人将获得永恒的启示。上帝将使朽坏的灵魂获得永生，将义人的灵从坟墓中提升到永恒的高处，使他们与天使同列。
prophecies.q_en: Thanksgiving Hymns (1QH) — Resurrection of the Righteous
prophecies.a_en: The dead among the worms shall be raised from dust, and those burdened with guilt shall receive eternal revelation. God will grant eternal life to decaying spirits, raising the souls of the righteous from the grave to eternal heights, placing them among the angels.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据死海古卷中的末世论文献推算
prophecies.yearReason_en: Derived from the eschatological texts in the Dead Sea Scrolls

prophecies.q: 《默基洗德卷》(11Q13) 末日审判者默基洗德
prophecies.a: 在末日的第十个禧年，默基洗德将来临，对彼列和他的灵执行审判。他将宣告大赦，释放所有被黑暗势力俘虏的人。这就是以赛亚所预言的「传好信息给锡安的人」。默基洗德将成为末日审判的执行者。
prophecies.q_en: Melchizedek Scroll (11Q13) — Melchizedek as Eschatological Judge
prophecies.a_en: In the tenth and final Jubilee, Melchizedek will come to execute judgment against Belial and his spirits. He will proclaim the great liberation, freeing all captives of dark forces. This is the one Isaiah prophesied as 'the herald of good news to Zion.' Melchizedek will serve as the executor of final judgment.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据死海古卷中的末世论文献推算
prophecies.yearReason_en: Derived from the eschatological texts in the Dead Sea Scrolls

prophecies.q: 《大马士革文献》(CD) 新约的建立
prophecies.a: 在大马士革之地，一批忠信者与上帝立了新约。他们离开了犹大之地，前往北方，在那里建立了义的社区。末日来临时，凡背弃新约的人都将被从生命册上除名，与邪恶的人一同灭亡。
prophecies.q_en: Damascus Document (CD) — Establishment of the New Covenant
prophecies.a_en: In the land of Damascus, a group of faithful ones entered a new covenant with God. They departed from the land of Judah and went north, establishing a community of righteousness. When the end comes, all who betrayed the new covenant will be blotted from the book of life and perish with the wicked.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 库姆兰社区确实建立了一个与主流犹太教分离的「新约」社区，实行严格的宗教规条和公社生活。但「大马士革」是否为实际地名仍有争议（可能是隐喻）。社区于公元68年被毁，未能存续至所预言的末日。不过「新约」概念深刻影响了早期基督教的「新约」神学。
prophecies.verdict_en: The Qumran community did establish a separatist 'new covenant' community with strict religious rules and communal living. Whether 'Damascus' is literal or metaphorical remains debated. The community was destroyed in 68 AD, not surviving to the predicted end times. However, the 'new covenant' concept profoundly influenced early Christian 'New Testament' theology.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据死海古卷中的末世论文献推算
prophecies.yearReason_en: Derived from the eschatological texts in the Dead Sea Scrolls

prophecies.q: 《以赛亚注释》(4QpIsa) 末世之战中耶路撒冷的命运
prophecies.a: 在末日之时，列国将聚集攻打耶路撒冷。圣城将经历极大的苦难和围困。但最终，上帝将从锡安兴起拯救者，击败攻城的敌人。耶路撒冷将被洁净，成为永恒的圣城。
prophecies.q_en: Pesher Isaiah (4QpIsa) — Jerusalem's Fate in the Eschatological War
prophecies.a_en: At the end of days, nations will gather to attack Jerusalem. The holy city will endure great suffering and siege. But ultimately, God will raise a savior from Zion to defeat the besieging enemies. Jerusalem will be purified and become the eternal holy city.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 耶路撒冷确实多次遭受围困和攻打：公元70年罗马围城并摧毁圣殿，公元135年巴尔·科赫巴起义后罗马再次夷平耶路撒冷并改名。此后耶路撒冷在十字军东征、奥斯曼等时期反复易手。1948年以色列建国后耶路撒冷被分割，1967年以色列统一耶路撒冷。城市至今仍是地缘政治争议焦点，「永恒圣城」的预言未完全实现。
prophecies.verdict_en: Jerusalem has indeed been besieged and attacked multiple times: Rome destroyed the Temple in 70 AD, razed the city again after the Bar Kokhba revolt in 135 AD. The city changed hands during the Crusades, Ottoman era, and more. After Israel's founding in 1948 Jerusalem was divided; Israel unified it in 1967. The city remains a geopolitical flashpoint, and the 'eternal holy city' prophecy remains incompletely fulfilled.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据死海古卷中的末世论文献推算
prophecies.yearReason_en: Derived from the eschatological texts in the Dead Sea Scrolls

prophecies.q: 《战争卷轴》—— 战争的武器与编制
prophecies.a: 光明之子的军队将配备剑、矛、盾牌和弓箭。步兵编为千人队、百人队和十人队。骑兵在两翼策应。号角信号指挥进退。每位战士的盾牌上都刻有神的名号。
prophecies.q_en: War Scroll — Weapons and formation
prophecies.a_en: The army of the Sons of Light will be equipped with swords, spears, shields, and bows. Infantry organized in units of thousands, hundreds, and tens. Cavalry supports the flanks. Trumpet signals direct advance and retreat. Each warrior's shield bears God's name.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据死海古卷中的末世论文献推算
prophecies.yearReason_en: Derived from the eschatological texts in the Dead Sea Scrolls

prophecies.q: 《社区规章》(1QS) —— 两灵论
prophecies.a: 上帝创造了两种灵：光明之灵和黑暗之灵。每个人内心都有这两种灵的争斗。光明之灵引导人行义，黑暗之灵诱惑人犯罪。最终光明将战胜黑暗。
prophecies.q_en: Community Rule (1QS) — Doctrine of Two Spirits
prophecies.a_en: God created two spirits: the Spirit of Light and the Spirit of Darkness. Within every person, these two spirits contend. The Spirit of Light guides toward righteousness; the Spirit of Darkness tempts toward sin. Ultimately light will triumph over darkness.
prophecies.yearReason: 神学教义，非时间预言
prophecies.yearReason_en: Theological doctrine, not a time-based prophecy

prophecies.q: 《社区规章》—— 末日净化
prophecies.a: 在末日，上帝将用圣灵的水净化义人，洗去他们一切的污秽。如同精炼金子一样，火将净化人的灵魂。被净化者将获得永恒的知识。
prophecies.q_en: Community Rule — End-times purification
prophecies.a_en: At the end of days, God will purify the righteous with the water of the Holy Spirit, washing away all their impurities. Like refining gold, fire will purify the soul. The purified will gain eternal knowledge.
prophecies.yearReason: 末世预言，死海古卷未设定具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: End-times prophecy, no specific date in Dead Sea Scrolls

prophecies.q: 《感恩诗篇》(1QH) —— 义师的苦难
prophecies.a: 他们围困我如同大海的波浪。他们的阴谋像深渊之水向我涌来。但你，上帝，在暴风中保护了我。你使我的脚站在磐石上，使我行走在永恒的道路上。
prophecies.q_en: Thanksgiving Hymns (1QH) — Suffering of the Teacher
prophecies.a_en: They surrounded me like waves of the sea. Their plots surged toward me like waters of the abyss. But You, God, protected me in the storm. You set my feet upon rock and made me walk on the eternal path.
prophecies.yearReason: 诗歌文学，非时间预言
prophecies.yearReason_en: Poetic literature, not a time-based prophecy

prophecies.q: 《哈巴谷书注释》(1QpHab) —— 义师与恶祭司
prophecies.a: 恶祭司迫害了义师，在义师的赎罪日（按不同历法计算）袭击了他。但恶祭司最终将因他对穷人的压迫和对神庙的亵渎而遭到上帝的审判。
prophecies.q_en: Habakkuk Pesher (1QpHab) — Teacher of Righteousness vs Wicked Priest
prophecies.a_en: The Wicked Priest persecuted the Teacher of Righteousness, attacking him on the Teacher's Day of Atonement (calculated by a different calendar). But the Wicked Priest will ultimately face God's judgment for oppressing the poor and desecrating the Temple.
prophecies.yearReason: 历史注释，具体时间存在学术争议
prophecies.yearReason_en: Historical commentary, exact dating is academically debated

prophecies.q: 《以赛亚书注释》—— 弥赛亚的两种身份
prophecies.a: 死海古卷中提到两位弥赛亚：一位来自亚伦家族（祭司弥赛亚），一位来自大卫家族（王室弥赛亚）。祭司弥赛亚的地位高于王室弥赛亚。
prophecies.q_en: Isaiah Pesher — Two Messiahs
prophecies.a_en: The Dead Sea Scrolls mention two Messiahs: one from Aaron's line (priestly Messiah) and one from David's line (royal Messiah). The priestly Messiah ranks above the royal Messiah.
prophecies.yearReason: 弥赛亚神学，非时间预言
prophecies.yearReason_en: Messianic theology, not a time-based prophecy

prophecies.q: 《战争卷轴》—— 最终胜利的庆典
prophecies.a: 在最终胜利之后，光明之子将唱赞美诗。大祭司将祝福军队和上帝。他们将焚烧战利品作为献祭。整个创造界都将庆祝黑暗的终结。
prophecies.q_en: War Scroll — Celebration of final victory
prophecies.a_en: After the final victory, the Sons of Light will sing hymns of praise. The High Priest will bless the army and God. They will burn spoils as sacrifice. All creation will celebrate the end of darkness.
prophecies.yearReason: 末世预言，死海古卷未设定具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: End-times prophecy, no specific date in Dead Sea Scrolls

prophecies.q: 《铜卷》(3Q15) —— 隐藏的宝藏
prophecies.a: 铜卷记载了64处隐藏宝藏的位置，包括大量金银和圣殿器物。据估计总价值可能超过现代的十亿美元。这些宝藏据称在罗马人入侵前被隐藏。
prophecies.q_en: Copper Scroll (3Q15) — Hidden treasures
prophecies.a_en: The Copper Scroll records 64 locations of hidden treasures, including vast amounts of gold, silver, and Temple vessels. The estimated total value may exceed a billion modern dollars. These treasures were allegedly hidden before the Roman invasion.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 至今没有考古学家成功找到铜卷所记载的任何一处宝藏。许多位置描述因2000年的地貌变化而无法确认。一些学者认为铜卷记载的是真实宝藏（可能是圣殿财宝），另一些认为是虚构或象征性记录。
prophecies.verdict_en: No archaeologist has successfully found any treasure recorded in the Copper Scroll. Many location descriptions are unverifiable due to 2,000 years of landscape changes. Some scholars believe the scroll records real treasure (possibly Temple treasures), while others consider it fictional or symbolic.
prophecies.yearReason: 罗马人摧毁圣殿的年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Year the Romans destroyed the Temple

prophecies.q: 《圣殿卷》(11QT) —— 理想圣殿的设计
prophecies.a: 上帝将在末日亲自建造一座永恒的圣殿。这座圣殿将比所罗门和第二圣殿更加宏伟。它将有三层围墙，每层都按照精确的尺寸建造。圣殿的纯洁将永不被玷污。
prophecies.q_en: Temple Scroll (11QT) — Design of the ideal Temple
prophecies.a_en: God will personally build an eternal Temple at the end of days. This Temple will be more magnificent than Solomon's and the Second Temple. It will have three concentric walls, each built to precise dimensions. The Temple's purity will never be defiled.
prophecies.yearReason: 末世理想，死海古卷未设定具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: End-times ideal, no specific date in Dead Sea Scrolls

prophecies.q: 《大马士革文献》(CD) —— 新约的预言
prophecies.a: 在末日到来之前的四十年，义师将逝世。从那时起直到弥赛亚的到来，所有拿剑的人都将被交付毁灭。新约将在大马士革之地被建立。
prophecies.q_en: Damascus Document (CD) — Prophecy of the New Covenant
prophecies.a_en: Forty years before the end of days, the Teacher of Righteousness will die. From then until the Messiah's coming, all who take up the sword will be delivered to destruction. A New Covenant will be established in the land of Damascus.
prophecies.yearReason: 末世时间表，具体年份不确定
prophecies.yearReason_en: Eschatological timeline, specific year uncertain

prophecies.q: 《战争卷轴》—— 战争中的祷告
prophecies.a: 在每轮战斗之间，祭司和利未人将高声祈祷。他们将祝福上帝的军队，诅咒彼列和他的黑暗军团。祷告的力量与武器的力量同样重要。
prophecies.q_en: War Scroll — Prayers during battle
prophecies.a_en: Between each round of battle, priests and Levites will pray aloud. They will bless God's army and curse Belial and his forces of darkness. The power of prayer is as important as the power of weapons.
prophecies.yearReason: 末世战争描述，死海古卷未设定具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: End-times war description, no specific date in Dead Sea Scrolls

prophecies.q: 《社区规章》—— 入会仪式
prophecies.a: 加入社区的人必须将全部财产交给社区，经过一年的考验期，然后通过洗礼进入盟约。他们发誓遵守摩西律法，与罪恶分离，保守社区的秘密。
prophecies.q_en: Community Rule — Initiation ceremony
prophecies.a_en: Those joining the community must surrender all property, undergo a one-year probation, then enter the covenant through ritual immersion. They swear to follow the Law of Moses, separate from wickedness, and keep the community's secrets.
prophecies.yearReason: 社区制度描述，非时间预言
prophecies.yearReason_en: Community regulation description, not a time-based prophecy

prophecies.q: 4Q521 —— 弥赛亚的神迹
prophecies.a: 天地将听从弥赛亚的命令。他将医治伤者，使死人复活，向穷人传报好消息。主将做从未有过的奇妙之事。
prophecies.q_en: 4Q521 — Messianic miracles
prophecies.a_en: Heaven and earth will obey the Messiah's commands. He will heal the wounded, raise the dead, and bring good news to the poor. The Lord will do wondrous things never done before.
prophecies.yearReason: 弥赛亚预言，死海古卷未设定具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Messianic prophecy, no specific date in Dead Sea Scrolls

prophecies.q: 《那鸿书注释》—— 对犹太国王的批评
prophecies.a: 「寻求平滑事物的人」（法利赛人）曾邀请希腊国王德米特里进入耶路撒冷。雄狮（亚历山大·雅纳）对他们施以钉十字架的惩罚。这在以色列从未发生过。
prophecies.q_en: Nahum Pesher — Criticism of Jewish kings
prophecies.a_en: 'The seekers of smooth things' (Pharisees) invited Greek King Demetrius into Jerusalem. The Lion of Wrath (Alexander Jannaeus) punished them by crucifixion. This had never happened before in Israel.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 约前88年哈斯蒙尼王亚历山大·雅纳镇压法利赛人叛乱，钉死800名法利赛人——约瑟夫斯在《犹太古史》(XIII.14.2)中详细记载了这一事件。死海古卷的注释与历史记录高度吻合。
prophecies.verdict_en: Around 88 BC, Hasmonean king Alexander Jannaeus suppressed a Pharisee rebellion by crucifying 800 Pharisees — Josephus records this in Antiquities (XIII.14.2). The Dead Sea Scrolls commentary closely matches the historical record.
prophecies.yearReason: 亚历山大·雅纳镇压法利赛人的历史记录
prophecies.yearReason_en: Historical record of Alexander Jannaeus suppressing the Pharisees

prophecies.q: 《社区规章》—— 末日的宴席
prophecies.a: 当弥赛亚降临时，他将与社区成员共进末世的宴席。祭司弥赛亚先祝福面包和酒，然后王室弥赛亚伸手取食。所有成员按等级入座。
prophecies.q_en: Community Rule — Messianic banquet
prophecies.a_en: When the Messiah comes, he will dine with community members at the eschatological banquet. The priestly Messiah blesses the bread and wine first, then the royal Messiah reaches for the food. All members are seated by rank.
prophecies.yearReason: 末世理想，死海古卷未设定具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: End-times ideal, no specific date in Dead Sea Scrolls

prophecies.q: 《战争卷轴》—— 彼列的军队
prophecies.a: 黑暗之子的军队由彼列（恶魔首领）率领。他的军团包括以东人、摩押人、亚扪人、非利士人和基提人（罗马人）。他们将从四面八方进攻光明之子。
prophecies.q_en: War Scroll — Belial's army
prophecies.a_en: The army of the Sons of Darkness is led by Belial (chief of demons). His legions include the Edomites, Moabites, Ammonites, Philistines, and Kittim (Romans). They will attack the Sons of Light from all directions.
prophecies.yearReason: 末世战争描述，死海古卷未设定具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: End-times war description, no specific date in Dead Sea Scrolls

prophecies.q: 《赞美诗卷》(11QPsa) —— 大卫的秘密
prophecies.a: 大卫写了3600首赞美诗和450首歌曲。他因智慧和启示写了这一切。他一生中行走在上帝面前，上帝赐予他智慧和明亮的光。
prophecies.q_en: Psalms Scroll (11QPsa) — David's secret
prophecies.a_en: David wrote 3,600 psalms and 450 songs. He wrote all these through wisdom and revelation. He walked before God all his life, and God granted him wisdom and brilliant light.
prophecies.yearReason: 文学传统，非时间预言
prophecies.yearReason_en: Literary tradition, not a time-based prophecy

prophecies.q: 4Q246 —— 「神之子」文献
prophecies.a: 他将被称为「至高者之子」，人们将称他为「神之子」。他的王国将是永恒的王国。他将以真理审判大地，与万国和平共处。他的统治将像永恒的统治一样。
prophecies.q_en: 4Q246 — 'Son of God' text
prophecies.a_en: He will be called 'Son of the Most High,' and they will call him 'Son of God.' His kingdom will be an eternal kingdom. He will judge the earth in truth and make peace with all nations. His rule will be like an eternal rule.
prophecies.yearReason: 弥赛亚预言，死海古卷未设定具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Messianic prophecy, no specific date in Dead Sea Scrolls

prophecies.q: 《歌颂安息日献祭》(4Q400-407) —— 天使的礼拜
prophecies.a: 七位大天使长在天上的圣殿中主持礼拜。他们轮流在七个安息日中赞美上帝。天使的面孔如同活的光辉，他们的翅膀发出火焰般的声响。
prophecies.q_en: Songs of the Sabbath Sacrifice (4Q400-407) — Angelic worship
prophecies.a_en: Seven archangels preside over worship in the heavenly Temple. They take turns praising God over seven Sabbaths. Angels' faces are like living radiance, and their wings make a sound like flames.
prophecies.yearReason: 天使学描述，非时间预言
prophecies.yearReason_en: Angelological description, not a time-based prophecy

prophecies.q: 死海古卷预言罗马对犹太的统治
prophecies.a: 基提人（罗马人）将从西方跨海而来，征服许多民族。他们的军队将践踏土地，毁灭一切。他们向自己的军旗献祭。他们的统治将持续到上帝亲自终结它。
prophecies.q_en: Dead Sea Scrolls predicted Roman rule over Judea
prophecies.a_en: The Kittim (Romans) will come from the West across the sea, conquering many nations. Their armies will trample the land and destroy everything. They sacrifice to their military standards. Their rule will last until God himself ends it.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 公元前63年庞培率罗马军队进入耶路撒冷，犹太地区成为罗马附庸。罗马人确实「从西方跨海而来」，对犹太的统治持续了数百年。罗马军团确实崇拜军旗（鹰旗）——约瑟夫斯和其他史家都有记载。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 63 BC, Pompey led Roman forces into Jerusalem, making Judea a Roman client state. Romans did 'come from the West across the sea,' and their rule lasted centuries. Roman legions did worship their standards (eagles) — recorded by Josephus and other historians.
prophecies.yearReason: 罗马进入耶路撒冷的历史记录
prophecies.yearReason_en: Historical record of Roman entry into Jerusalem

prophecies.q: 《大马士革文献》—— 义师的教导
prophecies.a: 义师被上帝兴起，引导选民走正路。他教导他们分辨善恶、洁净与不洁。凡听从他教导的人将在末日得救。凡拒绝他的人将与恶人一同灭亡。
prophecies.q_en: Damascus Document — Teachings of the Teacher
prophecies.a_en: The Teacher of Righteousness was raised by God to guide the elect on the right path. He taught them to discern good from evil, clean from unclean. Those who heed his teaching will be saved at the end of days. Those who reject him will perish with the wicked.
prophecies.yearReason: 社区教义，非时间预言
prophecies.yearReason_en: Community doctrine, not a time-based prophecy

prophecies.q: 4Q174 —— 末世的圣殿
prophecies.a: 上帝将在末日建立一座新的圣殿——不是由人手建造，而是由上帝亲自建造的永恒圣殿。在这圣殿中，献祭将永不中断，纯洁将永不被玷污。
prophecies.q_en: 4Q174 — End-times Temple
prophecies.a_en: God will establish a new Temple at the end of days — not built by human hands, but an eternal Temple built by God himself. In this Temple, sacrifice will never cease, and purity will never be defiled.
prophecies.yearReason: 末世预言，死海古卷未设定具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: End-times prophecy, no specific date in Dead Sea Scrolls

prophecies.q: 《社区规章》—— 光明终将战胜黑暗
prophecies.a: 上帝已为黑暗设定了终结的时刻。在那指定的时候，光明将永远消灭黑暗。真理将在全地显明。一切罪恶将被清除，不义将像烟雾一样消散。
prophecies.q_en: Community Rule — Light will ultimately triumph
prophecies.a_en: God has set an appointed time for the end of darkness. At that designated moment, light will permanently destroy darkness. Truth will be revealed throughout the earth. All wickedness will be purged, and injustice will dissipate like smoke.
prophecies.yearReason: 末世预言，死海古卷未设定具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: End-times prophecy, no specific date in Dead Sea Scrolls

prophecies.q: 光明之子与黑暗之子的最终决战
prophecies.q_en: The final battle between Sons of Light and Sons of Darkness
prophecies.a: 在末日之时，光明之子将与黑暗之子进行七次战役。前三次光明之子获胜，接下来三次黑暗之子获胜，第七次上帝亲自介入，光明最终战胜黑暗。
prophecies.a_en: In the end times, the Sons of Light will wage seven battles against the Sons of Darkness. The first three victories go to the Sons of Light, the next three to the Sons of Darkness, and in the seventh battle God himself intervenes, and Light ultimately triumphs over Darkness.
prophecies.yearReason: 末世预言，无具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Eschatological prophecy with no specific timeline

prophecies.q: 基提人（罗马人）的入侵
prophecies.q_en: The invasion of the Kittim (Romans)
prophecies.a: 基提人将从海上和陆地入侵，征服列国，掠夺圣地的财富，但最终将在末日之战中被击败。
prophecies.a_en: The Kittim will invade from sea and land, conquering nations and plundering the wealth of the Holy Land, but will ultimately be defeated in the final battle.
prophecies.yearReason: 基提人通常被认为指罗马人，公元前63年庞培征服耶路撒冷
prophecies.yearReason_en: The Kittim are generally identified as the Romans; Pompey conquered Jerusalem in 63 BCE
prophecies.verdict_zh: 公元前63年罗马将军庞培攻占耶路撒冷，此后罗马统治巴勒斯坦地区数百年，与预言描述的'基提人从海上和陆地入侵'相符
prophecies.verdict_en: Roman general Pompey conquered Jerusalem in 63 BCE, and Rome ruled Palestine for centuries afterward, matching the description of the Kittim invading from sea and land

prophecies.q: 新耶路撒冷的降临
prophecies.q_en: The descent of the New Jerusalem
prophecies.a: 在末日审判之后，一个新的耶路撒冷将从天而降，成为义人永恒的居所，圣殿将被重建，上帝将永远与其子民同在。
prophecies.a_en: After the final judgment, a New Jerusalem will descend from heaven, becoming the eternal dwelling place of the righteous. The Temple will be rebuilt, and God will dwell with His people forever.
prophecies.yearReason: 末世预言，无具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Eschatological prophecy with no specific timeline

prophecies.q: 弥赛亚的双重降临
prophecies.q_en: The dual Messiah prophecy
prophecies.a: 将有两位弥赛亚出现：一位是亚伦的弥赛亚（祭司弥赛亚），负责恢复圣殿礼拜；一位是以色列的弥赛亚（王室弥赛亚），负责恢复大卫王朝的统治。
prophecies.a_en: Two Messiahs will appear: the Messiah of Aaron (priestly Messiah) who will restore Temple worship, and the Messiah of Israel (royal Messiah) who will restore the Davidic monarchy.
prophecies.yearReason: 末世预言，无具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Eschatological prophecy with no specific timeline

prophecies.q: 邪恶祭司的审判
prophecies.q_en: The judgment of the Wicked Priest
prophecies.a: 邪恶的祭司起初被称为真理之名，但当他掌权后，他的心变得骄傲，背弃了上帝，为了财富而掠夺人民。上帝将把他交在敌人手中受审判。
prophecies.a_en: The Wicked Priest was initially called by the name of truth, but when he rose to power his heart became proud, he forsook God, and he plundered the people for wealth. God will deliver him into the hands of his enemies for judgment.
prophecies.yearReason: 邪恶祭司通常被认为是哈斯蒙尼王朝的亚历山大·亚奈乌斯
prophecies.yearReason_en: The Wicked Priest is often identified as Alexander Jannaeus of the Hasmonean dynasty
prophecies.verdict_zh: 亚历山大·亚奈乌斯在位期间以暴政和掠夺著称，公元前88年在耶路撒冷屠杀800名法利赛人
prophecies.verdict_en: Alexander Jannaeus was known for tyranny; in 88 BCE he crucified 800 Pharisees in Jerusalem

prophecies.q: 战争卷轴中的军事编制预言
prophecies.q_en: Military organization in the War Scroll
prophecies.a: 末日之战中，光明之子的军队将按严格的军事编制组织：步兵持七肘长矛和盾牌，骑兵配弓箭和投石索，军旗上书写上帝之名和天使之名。
prophecies.a_en: In the final battle, the army of the Sons of Light will be organized in strict military formation: infantry with seven-cubit spears and shields, cavalry with bows and slings, banners inscribed with God's name and angels' names.
prophecies.yearReason: 末世预言中的军事描述
prophecies.yearReason_en: Military description within eschatological prophecy

prophecies.q: 末日的四十年过渡期
prophecies.q_en: The forty-year transitional period of the end times
prophecies.a: 从公义教师逝世之日起，到所有持刀剑之人与谎言者一同被消灭，约有四十年。在这四十年中，上帝的愤怒将向以色列倾泻。
prophecies.a_en: From the day the Teacher of Righteousness passes away until all men of war who followed the Liar are consumed, there will be about forty years. During these forty years, God's wrath will be poured out upon Israel.
prophecies.yearReason: 取决于公义教师的确切死亡时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Depends on the exact death date of the Teacher of Righteousness

prophecies.q: 铜卷轴中的宝藏预言
prophecies.q_en: The treasure prophecy in the Copper Scroll
prophecies.a: 铜卷轴记录了六十四处隐藏的金银和圣器宝藏的位置，分布在耶路撒冷、耶利哥和周边地区。总价值估计超过一百吨金银。
prophecies.a_en: The Copper Scroll records sixty-four locations of hidden treasures of gold, silver, and sacred vessels, distributed across Jerusalem, Jericho, and surrounding areas, with an estimated total value exceeding one hundred tons of gold and silver.
prophecies.yearReason: 宝藏隐藏时间约在公元70年圣殿被毁前后
prophecies.yearReason_en: Treasures likely hidden around 70 CE when the Temple was destroyed

prophecies.q: 末日审判中的天使参战
prophecies.q_en: Angels joining the final battle
prophecies.a: 在末日之战中，天使长米迦勒将率领天使大军与光明之子并肩作战。彼列则率领堕落天使和黑暗之子的军队对抗。天上和地上的战争将同时进行。
prophecies.a_en: In the final battle, the Archangel Michael will lead the heavenly host to fight alongside the Sons of Light. Belial will lead fallen angels and the army of the Sons of Darkness. War will be waged simultaneously in heaven and on earth.
prophecies.yearReason: 末世预言，无具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Eschatological prophecy with no specific timeline
